reviews.author: 鶴峰良宣
reviews.text:
賑やかで活気のあるフードエリア。どのお店も店員からメニューを差し出され「座って食べて行きなさい」のお誘い。個人的には価格は高めの設定だと思います。
カルグクスは永谷園のお茶漬けを思い出させられました。海苔の香りがとても心地良く私好みなのですが濃い目の味付けで私には塩っぱかったです。
水餃子は大きめで食べ応えがあり具材もしっかり入って満足でき
チヂミはイメージしてたよりお好み焼きの様な分厚さで油ギッシュだったので食べる気は起きませんでした。美味しいのかも知れませんが、酸化した油だと体調を悪くするのでベトナムのバインセオなども食べない様にしてますので…
キンパは日本だと油っこいですが、本場のキンパはスッキリ、シャキっとした食感で癖になる味わいでとても気に入りした。

reviews.author: Víctor L. M.
reviews.text:
Comida extraordinaria, todo pero especialmente los fideos verdes fríos. Son adictivos.
Se entiende el hype y que es un sitio de comida rápida, aunque sea tradicional, pero las prisas son excesivas.
Si hay ocasión y la espera no es muy larga, hay que probarlo.

reviews.author: smith
reviews.text: Best noodle texture ever. The kalguksu was fantastic and the taste worked so well with the soft and chewy noodles. We got one of everything on the menu. Dumplings were good, nice skin. The cold noodles have the perfect noodle texture. I find the cold noodles are normally too al dente but this place had it perfect, nice and soft. The kongguksu soybean noodles were not for me, but certainly special. Kalguksu had nice umami broth, perfect wontons, and nice bite. We went around 11am and it was already quite busy, as we were leaving there was a line, so definitely come earlier.

reviews.author: becca Re
reviews.text:
一不小心失控點太多.....
一下飛機真的太餓了，但不得不說份量很足夠！！
韓國的餃子🥟我好喜歡！！
不得不說座位很多，人員服務很一般....
#美食r #明洞餃子 #韓國觀光客

reviews.author: ひろ
reviews.text:
明洞餃子に行きました！
カルグクスとマンドゥを注文しましたが、どちらもとても美味しかったです😊

カルグクスはスープに旨みがしっかりあって、麺もやさしい食感で食べやすかったです。マンドゥも具がたっぷりで、人気店なのも納得の味でした🥟✨

特に印象に残ったのは、にんにくの効いたキムチです！
かなりパンチのある味ですが、カルグクスとの相性が最高で、クセになる美味しさでした。韓国らしいしっかりした味を楽しみたい方にはぜひ食べてほしいです🔥

店内は混んでいましたが回転が早く、明洞で定番の韓国料理を食べたい方におすすめのお店です！

명동교자에 다녀왔습니다!
칼국수와 만두를 주문했는데 둘 다 정말 맛있었습니다😊

칼국수는 국물에 깊은 맛이 있고, 면도 부드러워서 먹기 좋았습니다. 만두도 속이 꽉 차 있어서 왜 인기 있는 곳인지 알 수 있었습니다🥟✨

특히 기억에 남았던 건 마늘향이 강한 김치였습니다!
맛이 꽤 강하지만 칼국수와의 조합이 정말 최고였고, 계속 먹고 싶어지는 맛이었습니다. 한국다운 진한 맛을 좋아하는 분들께 꼭 추천하고 싶습니다🔥

매장은 붐볐지만 회전이 빠른 편이었고, 명동에서 대표적인 한국 음식을 먹고 싶다면 추천할 만한 곳입니다!

reviews.author: Traveler
reviews.text:
米其林推薦人很多 點了包子和刀削麵很好吃
首爾明洞擁有逾50年歷史的傳奇名店，自2017年起連年榮獲米其林必比登推介。招牌菜為濃郁雞湯底的刀切麵（칼국수）及皮薄餡紮實的蒸餃（만두）

reviews.author: JasonPorter1201
reviews.text:
It used to be an actual playground for children and there was a kindergarten like a decade ago. maybe two decades now...

Now this field is remodeled for 'arts' and 'culture'.
And it probably will be used as a public standing pub 2.0 version for the youth just as it always has been.

It's 2.0 because the public toilet has been remodeled and now there is a GS25 convenient store like 5 feet away. The previous CV store was suck to be honest.

reviews.author: Morgan Smith
reviews.text: Name is a bit misleading, this is a Line Friends store. They have a great selection of BT21 merchandise and much smaller selections of other idol group Line Friends merch, but no other kpop items and not every group with Line Friends characters is represented. The first floor was occupied by a pop-up when I visited, but I was able to visit the permanent second floor shop without needing to queue for the pop-up. Helpful staff, disappointing store.

reviews.author: Mountain Top
reviews.text:
Tourists from a specific country next door to the west of Korea are talking so loud whereever they go, I could not focus even on looking at those beautiful palace buildings and surrounding gardens.

It was so annoying that it was even difficult to pay attention to take pictures.

The management office should educate those disrespectable people on public manner before letting them in.

Nel pieno centro di Seul , questa zona , che prima era un autostrada , adesso è stata convertita a zona dedicata all utenza pubblica come parco da vivere. Esperienza unica passeggiate a tarda sera oppure per una corsetta mattutina quando Seul si sveglia.

reviews.author: Layla Wyn
reviews.text: It’s Nice but a Little dangerous

reviews.author: E K Goh
reviews.text:
It was a trekking trip out of the blue. Having more than 12 hours to my departure from Seoul, my Korean friend suggested we go for some workout in the mountain.
Our adventure starts from Bulgwang Station and there was already many groups of people heading towards Bukhansan.
I have not been exercising for a while and the first stop was at the look out gate, elevation of 160m and already taking my half my life away.
The weather of early summer is proving too hot for me and I was perspiring like a dog.
Reaching a height of 160m was like a great achievement 👏 but that was only less than 10% to the peak !
Still i fairly good shape, we continued for the next stop, where there are public toilets and vending machine.
We persevere and continue after 15min of rest for our 3rd stop, which is a small stream and the water was cold and refreshing.
The 4th stop is at a crossroad to 836m Baegundae peak or the lower 505m Wonhyobong peak. Already 3 quarter dead, we decided to go for Wonhyobong.
Although it show only 1200m, the climb was lasting forever. Trying to catch my breadth, we stopped at 450m amd 400m left to go.
Getting to Wonhyobong peak looks easy but the final climb was much more steep. It tool us another 25min to reach the peak and the view was exhilarating.
Good job, it is worth the climb, 2.5hours

reviews.author: Minh Thu
reviews.text: Rất đáng thăm quan

reviews.author: Romanioli
reviews.text:
What amazed me the most about Bukhansan (outside of the incredible views) is its proximity to the city itself.
The views, as mentioned before, were incredible and breathtaking.
You know it’s a good hiking trip when every two minutes you want to take your phone out to take yet another picture. And that was certainly the case here.

reviews.author: Ernest Tock
reviews.text: Tough but rewarding, would not reccomend to older beginners tho as final ascent uses quite a bit of arms on slippery rock face
